prestazioni: FA20 (4U-GSE) engine: Tomei 272° duration, 11.5mm lift titanium retainer valvetrain kit with Supertech dual valve springs and titanium retainers for 9,000 RPM stability, paired with a HKS Hi-Power 4-2-1 stainless steel header and a custom 3-inch Fujitsubo Authorize R exhaust system with N1 muffler for optimized scavenging and 220+ hp at the wheels

Garrett GTX2867R turbocharger with a custom Precision Turbo wastegate (44mm) and a GReddy intercooler kit (front-mount, 600x300x80mm core) running 18 psi on E85, managed by a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with flex-fuel sensor and dual Bosch 028 high-flow fuel pumps feeding ID1000x injectors and a Tomei high-pressure fuel rail

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 8/18kg spring rates, spherical bearing top mounts, and adjustable camber plates, paired with Cusco 22mm front and 19mm rear adjustable sway bars, Whiteline front and rear subframe lockout kits, and SuperPro poly bushings (full chassis refresh) for sub-3.5s 60-foot times on R-compound tires
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (front fenders, rear quarter panels, and overfenders) with custom carbon fiber canards and a custom 3D-printed front splitter (25mm overhang) for -120kg of downforce at 160 km/h, all painted in Toyota Racing Development (TRD) Heritage Red (040)

Volk Racing TE37SL wheels in 17x9.5 +35 front and 17x10.5 +40 rear, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (245/40/17 front, 275/35/17 rear), with custom TRD-branded center caps and titanium lug nuts from Project Kics

Custom TRD-inspired carbon fiber hood with dual 3-inch venting ducts for intercooler airflow, paired with a Seibon carbon fiber trunk with integrated ducktail spoiler, and a custom rear diffuser from Varis (3-piece, adjustable angle) for aero balance, all finished with a full 3M Matte Black vinyl wrap on the roof and mirrors
